title: [F] Edge-Runtime Support for CloudFlare, Vercel
author: TimKieu
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

Edge-Runtime V8 Javascript at CloudFlare, Vercel are more and more popular than Nodejs soon.
Avoid nodejs codes, move to Web API/V8 engine API code.

## Motivation

SheetJS should port to run well on CloudFlare Pages & Workers and Vercel support both server-side and client/browser side code with Svelte/Sveltkit,  React Remix/Nextjs.

## Example

Avoid using fs, os, Buffer, crypto... which based on NodeJS runtime, port to UnInt8Array buffer.

comments.author: akhil-naidu
comments.body:
I would like to see `exceljs` supported natively in edge environment by porting the required node runtime features to UnInit8Array Buffer.

This allows many Nextjs projects to opt for `exceljs` as the default reporting tool.

comments.author: mondayrunner
comments.body: You can use https://www.npmjs.com/package/xlsx-js-style for now, that works on CloudFlare
